title: Office space
doc_html:
§2562.16.  Office space

The governing authority for the Parish of Jefferson shall provide suitable space, within the territorial boundaries of this court, for the operation thereof.  

Acts 1966, No. 5, §16, eff. June 9, 1966, at 1:45 P.M.
